/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/make_input.dir/Inputdata/make_input.c.o CMakeFiles/make_input.dir/leak.c.o CMakeFiles/make_input.dir/pqclean/crypto_sign/falcon-512/clean/fft.c.o CMakeFiles/make_input.dir/pqclean/crypto_sign/falcon-512/clean/fpr.c.o CMakeFiles/make_input.dir/pqclean/crypto_sign/falcon-512/clean/keygen.c.o CMakeFiles/make_input.dir/pqclean/crypto_sign/falcon-512/clean/codec.c.o CMakeFiles/make_input.dir/pqclean/crypto_sign/falcon-512/clean/vrfy.c.o CMakeFiles/make_input.dir/pqclean/crypto_sign/falcon-512/clean/common.c.o CMakeFiles/make_input.dir/pqclean/common/fips202.c.o  -o /mnt/d/github/FALCON_CC_SPA/bin/make_input
